_comment: Shipped preset for BiRefNet background removal. Adapted from ComfyUI's utility_birefnet_remove_background template — kept the subgraph structure intact, swapped PreviewImage for SaveImage (so output lives in output/ instead of temp/), and dropped the MaskPreview + MarkdownNote nodes since we surface only the cutout image. The subgraph 'Remove Background (BiRefNet)' wraps the RemoveBackground / LoadBackgroundRemovalModel / InvertMask / JoinImageWithAlpha chain — output is a transparent-bg PNG composited via JoinImageWithAlpha.
label: BiRefNet Cutout
description: Background removal via BiRefNet. Promptless — feeds the upstream image into a subgraph that segments the subject and composites it over an alpha channel. Output is a single transparent-bg PNG (COMFYTV_IMAGE).

image.error: Cutout needs an upstream image — wire one into this stage's image input.
